case_title: COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. TODD MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTIN, TODD AS TO PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTIN, TODD
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, TODD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 810 EDDY STREET, #401, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,850.00 RENT, $199.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,049.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. COUNSEL PRESENTED PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT. THE COURT, HAVING REVIEWED THE DOCUMENT, VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTED PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION. THE COURT FURTHER GRANTED JUDGMENT FOR RENT AND DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,049. ORDER & JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZISH, CSR# 1193

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Nov-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Nikita Scope, Esq., 512-0579, for plaintiff moving for summary judgment
No appearance by defendant. Counsel presented proof of service to the Court. The Court, having reviewed the document, VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTED
PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
(UNLAWFUL DETAINER). The Court further granted a judgment for rent and damages in
the amount of $2,049. ORDER & JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301) Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
